user.title: Local OpenAI STT
user.description: Connect to your local OpenAI-compatible speech-to-text server (e.g. faster-whisper-server, whisper.cpp, LocalAI).

data_description.base_url: Full URL ending in /v1, e.g. http://localhost:8000/v1
data_description.api_key: Optional. Many local servers do not require one.

data_description.model: Whisper model to use for transcription.
data_description.prompt: Optional bias text passed with each request. Useful for unusual vocabulary, names, or acronyms.
data_description.temperature: Sampling temperature. 0 is deterministic; higher values allow more variation.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the server or list models. Check the base URL and API key.

abort.already_configured: A Local OpenAI STT entry for this base URL already exists.

data_description.vad_silence_seconds: Trailing silence (in seconds) before the utterance is considered finished.
data_description.vad_min_speech_seconds: How much speech must be detected before end-of-speech can fire.
data_description.vad_speech_threshold: Silero VAD probability above which a frame is treated as speech (0–1).
